name: ai-context-bar
title: AI Context Bar
description: Persistent horizontal summary of the clinical context that will be sent with the next prompt.

props.name: onManage
props.description: Opens the caller's context picker. Omit for a read-only bar.

props.name: manageLabel
props.description: Accessible name for the manage control.

props.name: emptyMessage
props.description: Shown when no chips are supplied — an empty bar must still say what it means.

clinicalNotes: The active patient, encounter, documents, and date range must be visible before a prompt is sent, not discoverable afterwards in a settings panel — this bar is where a clinician confirms they are asking about the right patient. Render it above the composer and keep it in view while typing. The empty state says "No context attached" rather than rendering nothing, because a blank strip is indistinguishable from a component that failed to load.
notes: Wraps chips in a horizontally scrolling group labelled "Context sent with your prompt"; pair with ai-context-chip.
